# Chapter 29 Reprinting Work Orders

Use the Work Order Reprint Wizard to reprint a work order for a machine pending retirement
or being moved. The window also shows if the EGM is enabled as a server-based machine.

To reprint a work order:

1\. Click the Work Order Reprint icon on the Quick Access Toolbar OR navigate to IGT
Spade > Floor > Work Order Reprint. The Work Order Reprint Wizard window
opens.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/313.2.png)




<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="313" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 29 Reprinting Work Orders" -->

2\. Select one or more of the following filters to limit the choice of work orders to reprint:


<table>
<tr>
<th>Filter</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Filter by Date</td>
<td>Activates the date selection. Select a date to display only work orders created on the selected date.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Show work orders for all users</td>
<td>Work orders created by all users appear.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Show work orders for just the active user</td>
<td>Only work orders created by the currently logged-in user appear.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Filter by work order type</td>
<td>Enables the work order type drop-down list. Select the work order type desired. Only work orders of the type selected appear in the list.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Filter by Machine Numbers</td>
<td>Activates the Machine Num pane. Select the machines desired. Only work orders created for the selected machines appear in the list.</td>
</tr>
</table>


3\. Click Next. The Work Order Reprint Wizard window displays the results.



![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/314.1.png)



4\. Highlight the work order to reprint, or press and hold CTRL to highlight multiple orders.
5\. Click Next. The Finish (Print) screen appears.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="314" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 29 Reprinting Work Orders" -->




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/315.1.png)




6\. Review the work order information, then click Finish. The work order reprints.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="315" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->
